name: Kaitlynn Anderson
outcome: I started as a March cohort and I am very serious about my studies. I am recently divorced and a survivor of domestic abuse and school has helped me immensely cope and make my life better for my children and myself. I have already been working on GitHub utilizing my own personal development through portfolios.

name: Dylan Snyder
outcome: Attending Maestro College for my Associate of Applied Science in Business Administration has been a truly transformative experience. From day one, the program's flexibility allowed me to take complete control of my education, giving me the freedom to balance my coursework with my professional life and learn at my own pace without feeling overwhelmed. What really sets Maestro College apart, though, is how the technology works with you. The AI-driven learning tools adapt seamlessly to my unique learning style, breaking down complex business theories and administration concepts in a way that feels tailormade for how I process information. It bridges the gap between challenging material and real-world application, making the entire educational journey feel intuitive and deeply supportive. Ultimately, this degree program has done so much more than just teach me the fundamentals of business administration—it has truly empowered me to take charge of my future. Having this structured yet adaptive education backing me up has given me the confidence and the concrete skills needed to unlock new professional opportunities and shape the career path I’ve always wanted. Maestro College doesn't just offer a degree; it provides the exact tools and flexibility required to turn personal goals into a tangible, successful reality.

name: Troy Moser
program: October 2025 Cohort - BS of Science - Business and AI Pathway
outcome: My website development beforehand was poor at best. What I have learned in my first year is amazing. I can now read, understand, and produce REAL code. Whether I'm Python, React, JavaScript, and Typescript. That's amazing to me! Not to mention it's really at my pace. Sometimes I'm a week behind because I'm struggling, other times I'm a week ahead because something clicked and I got it! I love that!

name: Precious Vicknair
outcome: Before enrolling in Maestro College I didn't know at all what Python, JavaScript, or Typescript were, just that they were computer words. I'm only in month 6 and now I can code at a decent proficiency, I can debug simple errors, and feel pretty good about the progress I'm making. I can make small, input/output programs in all three platforms.

name: Jay young
outcome:
I am an electrician by trade and decided I wanted to take it a step further .So I signed up for Maestros very first cohort. Right away , I began learning vital applicable skills that I could practice and apply immediately.Since then I have participated in several hackathons and have developed several open source agentic projects on solana blockchain. The pace and one-on-one experience offered at maestro enables me to learn at my own pace,?and the curriculum is taught to me in the way I learn the best. I have since received a job offer from X-AI and am starting a brand new career. Thanks Maestro!

Full Submitted Proficiency: Ability to design and build complex agentic architecture using a variety of programming languages and frameworks.
